title: Write an Oban worker with a brief @moduledoc stating idempotency guarantees
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.PaymentRefundWorker` (queue `:payments`, max_attempts 8). The `@moduledoc` must state in plain English that the worker is idempotent via `refund_id` lookup and that Oban retries are safe. perform/1 takes `%{"refund_id" => id}`, looks up the refund with `MyApp.Payments.get_refund!(id)`, short-circuits with `:ok` if `refund.processed_at` is set, otherwise calls `MyApp.Payments.process_refund(refund)`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/payment_refund_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Standard worker with an additional @moduledoc requirement — tests that the philosophy surfaces in documentation, not just code.
